cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: EduLite AI is an offline English writing coach for African secondary schools. It helps students practise essays, creative writing, grammar, vocabulary and exam-style responses on ordinary low-cost laptops without internet.

test_prompts.prompt: A Year 10 student in Nigeria has written a short story that lacks suspense. Give simple feedback, identify three weaknesses, and rewrite one paragraph to make it more engaging while keeping the student's voice.

Help a beginner English learner write a 150-word informal email to a friend about preparing for school examinations. Use simple vocabulary, clear paragraphs, and give five useful phrases the learner can reuse.
